title: LANON 6 mil Black Nitrile Disposable Gloves, 3x Thicker Heavy-Duty Gloves, Food Grade, Powder-Free, Latex-Free, Textured Fingertips, EN 374, Medium(Pack of 100)
features: Professional & Sleek - The black disposable gloves are made of 100% nitrile. It's waterproof and resistant to a variety of low-concentration oil grease, brake cleaner, and light solvents. The respective duration against three EN ISO 374 test chemicals: K-Level 6, over 480 mins; P-Level 3, over 60 mins; and T-Level 6, over 480 mins.

Heavy Duty - Our 6-mil Thickness disposable nitrile gloves are the strongest form of nitrile gloves, better than plastic, vinyl, or latex. It has superior strength, is puncture resistant, and won't rip or tear easily. The pullout design of the packaging box is convenient and easy to remove.

Exellent Grip - As disposable work gloves, The textured fingertips design provide good grip and don't slip easily. ​It will provide workers a strong efficient grip in their handling of tools and equipments when working in wet or greasy applications.

Food Safe & Multipurpose - The black disposable gloves are food grade, latex-free, DEHP-free, and composed of better solutions for people with sensitive skin. We offer sizes medium, large and xl. They are ideal for hair dye, industrial use, food handling, cooking, food prep, BBQ, grill, cleaning, kitchen, and more.

Next-Level Performance - Our disposable gloves for hand protection are tested to meet the F.D.A 21 C.F.R, suitable for contact with all food types, EU Certificated, CAT III, with Standards EN ISO 374-1:2016+A1:2018 / Type B, EN 374-4:2013, EN ISO 374-5:2016, and have an AQL of 4.0.
description: Product Description NITRILE DISPOSABLE GLOVES Heavy Duty Gloves,6 Mil Thickness LANON black nitrile gloves is comfortable-safety. 6mil thickness high-quality nitrile material can provide incredible stretching force will not be ripped easily. Excellent barrier protection ideal for heavy industrial applications. Textured At Fingertip For A Better Grip The textured finish provides slip resistance in wet or dry conditions. Rolled cuffs add protection to the wrist and ensure safety and comfort. Superior Comfortable Fit The nitrile gloves are designed with curled cuffs for easy opening,quick wearing and quick disassembly. It fits like your own skin, brings superior comfort. FEATURES 6 Mil Thickness Textured Fingertips Food Contact Grade Powder Free Latex Free Silicone Free Tear Resistant Tactile Precision Textured fingertips provide excellent tactile touch to the phone screen. You can use your mobile phone to send messages without taking off your gloves. Suitable for those who require high flexibility and sensitivity. Food Contact Safety These are food grade gloves, suitable for contact with all food types, and have an AQL of 4.0. you can handle food with clean gloves. They're powder-free, latex-free & silicone Free.
